commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a self-hosted MathJax SVG bundle, initializes global MathJax typesetting from `ui/index.html`, and extends a Gateway HTTP asset-serving test for the new asset.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +3. Total +70 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the current behavior: the Control UI markdown renderer uses markdown-it without a math extension, so LaTeX delimiters are rendered as ordinary sanitized text. I did not run a browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed to decide the accepted math syntax and dependency/vendor provenance before an automated repair would be safe.

target.title: Fix Control UI equation rendering
target.body:
## Summary
- add a self-hosted MathJax SVG bundle to the Control UI public assets
- initialize MathJax from `ui/index.html` and re-typeset dynamically added chat content
- extend the Control UI HTTP asset test to cover the new self-hosted bundle

## Why
Control UI markdown currently leaves LaTeX-style equations unrendered. A self-hosted bundle keeps the fix compatible with the existing `script-src 'self'` CSP while avoiding external CDN dependencies.

## Testing
- `git diff --check`
- verified the same patch strategy against a live local OpenClaw install and confirmed the served page referenced a self-hosted MathJax asset
- full project test install was not completed in this environment
target.author: kambrian
